svg.text: Player Action → FastAPI → Mistral AI → SSE stream_delta → React state → UI (word-by-word)
26 event types · zero polling · immediate feedback · streaming LLM tokens
Backend write → Supabase → WAL → PowerSync Cloud → Client SQLite → useQuery() → merge
6 sync streams · offline-capable · automatic reconnect · multi-tab support
1. SSE delivers real-time game events (LLM tokens, votes, actions)
2. Backend persists results to Supabase after processing
3. PowerSync syncs Supabase state to all clients' local SQLite
4. useEffect hooks merge PowerSync diffs only when state differs
5. On reconnect, PowerSync catches up missed events automatically
Result: SSE for speed, PowerSync for reliability
